name: mezzofy-contact-form
description: AWS Lambda handler — routes Mezzofy contact form submissions via SES
notes: On Lambda Node.js 18+ runtime, @aws-sdk/client-ses is available natively.
You only need to bundle it if deploying to Node.js 16 or earlier.
To deploy: zip index.js (+ node_modules if needed) and upload to Lambda.
See README.md in this directory for full deployment instructions.
